requirement_topic.en: CEB Net-Metering and Net-Accounting Scheme Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: CEB净计量与净计费方案要求
requirement_topic.zht: CEB淨計量與淨計費方案要求

summary.en: The Ceylon Electricity Board (CEB) operates net-metering and net-accounting schemes for rooftop and small-scale solar PV systems. Under these schemes, inverters must be approved by CEB before connection. Technical requirements include: inverter capacity matching system size within CEB limits, approved anti-islanding protection, compatible communication and metering interfaces, and compliance with CEB application and inspection procedures. The schemes are governed by PUCSL-approved tariffs and CEB procedural guidelines. System size thresholds and eligibility rules apply.
summary.zh: 锡兰电力局（CEB）为屋顶和小型光伏系统运营净计量和净计费方案。在这些方案下，逆变器必须在并网前获得CEB批准。技术要求包括：逆变器容量在CEB限值内与系统规模匹配、经批准的防孤岛保护、兼容的通信和计量接口，以及遵守CEB申请和检查程序。该方案受PUCSL批准电价和CEB程序指引约束。系统容量上限和资格规则适用。
summary.zht: 錫蘭電力局（CEB）為屋頂和小型光伏系統運營淨計量和淨計費方案。在這些方案下，逆變器必須在併網前獲得CEB批准。技術要求包括：逆變器容量在CEB限值內與系統規模匹配、經批准的防孤島保護、兼容的通信和計量接口，以及遵守CEB申請和檢查程序。該方案受PUCSL批准電價和CEB程序指引約束。系統容量上限和資格規則適用。

standards_or_laws: CEB Net-Metering and Net-Accounting Scheme procedural guidelines
PUCSL-approved tariff orders for small-scale renewable energy
Sri Lanka Electricity Act No. 36 of 2024 (as amended by Act No. 14 of 2025)

summary.en: China's distributed PV net-metering and grid-connection framework is managed by the National Energy Administration (NEA) and State Grid / Southern Grid, using different application procedures, metering standards, and tariff mechanisms. Chinese distributed PV documentation and utility approvals are not transferable to CEB's Sri Lanka net-metering scheme.
summary.zh: 中国分布式光伏净计量和并网框架由国家能源局（NEA）及国家电网/南方电网管理，采用不同的申请程序、计量标准和电价机制。中国分布式光伏文件和公用事业批准文件不适用于CEB的斯里兰卡净计量方案。
summary.zht: 中國分布式光伏淨計量和併網框架由國家能源局（NEA）及國家電網/南方電網管理，採用不同的申請程序、計量標準和電價機制。中國分布式光伏文件和公用事業批准文件不適用於CEB的斯里蘭卡淨計量方案。

standards_or_laws: State Grid / China Southern Power Grid net-metering procedures

gap.en: Chinese net-metering or grid-connection approvals have no standing under CEB's scheme. Exporters and installers must follow the CEB application process: submit system design including inverter model and specifications, obtain CEB technical review and approval, install a CEB-compatible bidirectional meter, and pass CEB inspection before energisation. Inverter models not on CEB's approved or reviewed list may face delays.
gap.zh: 中国净计量或并网批准在CEB方案下不具效力。出口商和安装商须遵循CEB申请流程：提交包含逆变器型号和规格的系统设计，获得CEB技术审查和批准，安装CEB兼容双向电表，并在送电前通过CEB检查。不在CEB批准或审查名单上的逆变器型号可能面临延误。
gap.zht: 中國淨計量或併網批准在CEB方案下不具效力。出口商和安裝商須遵循CEB申請流程：提交包含逆變器型號和規格的系統設計，獲得CEB技術審查和批准，安裝CEB兼容雙向電表，並在送電前通過CEB檢查。不在CEB批准或審查名單上的逆變器型號可能面臨延誤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for net-metering or net-accounting scheme participation — CEB approval is required before connection
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for distributed PV grid connection in China under NEA and utility rules

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CEB net-metering scheme approval requires inverter pre-approval and system inspection by CEB. Chinese grid-connection documentation does not transfer. Follow CEB's application process and confirm inverter technical specifications meet CEB scheme requirements before system commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CEB净计量方案批准要求逆变器预先批准和系统检查。中国并网文件不可转用。在系统调试前，须遵循CEB申请流程并确认逆变器技术规格符合CEB方案要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CEB淨計量方案批准要求逆變器預先批准和系統檢查。中國併網文件不可轉用。在系統調試前，須遵循CEB申請流程並確認逆變器技術規格符合CEB方案要求。
